verdict_reasoning: HSPD1 is canonically mitochondrial/cytoplasmic but exhibits documented stress-induced and cancer-cell-induced surface display. Heat-stressed endothelial cells, cancer cells (actively releasing via exosomes), and capacitated sperm all display HSP60 on the outer leaflet. The protein reaches the PM by its own mechanism (active exocytosis). This is cell_state_induced surface accessibility: primarily oncogenic transformation (tumor cells) and acute stress (heat, hypoxia, infection-context).
